ArrowFieldSpec.description:
Recursive field-shape declaration.

Used to describe authored-shape JSON containers under `arrow_type` =
`Object` / `List` / `Json`. Scalar and parameterized Arrow types reuse the
same model with `properties` and `items` absent.

arrow_type.description: Arrow canonical type string from the shared type vocabulary. Parameterized canonical types must preserve the full string, e.g. 'Decimal128(38, 9)' — not 'Decimal128'. Bare authored-shape markers 'Object', 'List', and 'Json' declare JSON containers.
arrow_type.title: Arrow Type

ArrowFieldSpec.title: ArrowFieldSpec

Assignment.description: Single field assignment — writes one target field from expression or constant.
Assignment.title: Assignment

arrow_type.description: Arrow canonical type string from the shared type vocabulary. Parameterized canonical types must preserve the full string, e.g. 'Decimal128(38, 9)' — not 'Decimal128'. Bare authored-shape markers 'Object', 'List', and 'Json' declare JSON containers.
arrow_type.title: Arrow Type

AssignmentValue.description: Exactly one of `expression` or `constant` per spec §Assignment.
AssignmentValue.title: AssignmentValue

ConnectionEndpointRef.description:
Private connection-scoped database endpoint reference (`scope='connection'`).

Carries the verbatim provider-native object locator in `database_object`.
`endpoint_id` is an opaque handle DERIVED from that locator by
`analitiq.contracts.endpoint_identity.derive_db_endpoint_id` — a pure
function shipped in this package, so you can compute it yourself. It is
never decoded back to a target. The locator is the identity; hence it is
REQUIRED and non-null here.

connection_id.description: Connection reference selected in the parent pipeline. Typically a versioned connection ID (e.g. 'uuid_v1'); the schema accepts any non-empty string — engines resolve the reference at runtime.
connection_id.title: Connection Id

database_object.description: Verbatim provider-native object locator (catalog/schema/name), round-tripped from endpoint discovery. Required — the opaque `endpoint_id` cannot be parsed for identity.

endpoint_id.description: Opaque handle derived from `database_object` (`slug(schema)__slug(table)[__slug(catalog)]__<hash8>`). Omit it and it is derived from the locator; supply it and it must equal the derived handle.
endpoint_id.title: Endpoint Id

ConnectionEndpointRef.title: ConnectionEndpointRef

ConnectorEndpointRef.description:
Public connector endpoint reference (`scope='connector'`).

Pinned by the connection's connector_version. Carries NO `database_object`
— an API endpoint's locator lives in its endpoint document
(`operations.*.request.path`), not on the ref.

connection_id.description: Connection reference selected in the parent pipeline. Typically a versioned connection ID (e.g. 'uuid_v1'); the schema accepts any non-empty string — engines resolve the reference at runtime.
connection_id.title: Connection Id

endpoint_id.description: Connector endpoint identifier — the registry key selected from endpoint discovery (e.g. 'transfers'). Client-authored.
endpoint_id.title: Endpoint Id

ConnectorEndpointRef.title: ConnectorEndpointRef

arrow_type.description: Arrow canonical type string from the shared type vocabulary. Parameterized canonical types must preserve the full string, e.g. 'Decimal128(38, 9)' — not 'Decimal128'. Bare authored-shape markers 'Object', 'List', and 'Json' declare JSON containers.
arrow_type.title: Arrow Type

value.description: JSON literal value to assign. May be a JSON object when arrow_type is 'Object' or 'Json', a JSON array when arrow_type is 'List' or 'Json', or a JSON scalar for scalar Arrow types.
value.title: Value

DatabaseObject.description:
Provider-native database object identity.

Identifier strings are stored verbatim from introspection — no
case-folding, quoting, or normalization.

object_type.description: Open-string descriptive type (table, view, materialized_view, external_table, collection, …). Read execution must not branch on it.
object_type.title: Object Type

DatabaseObject.title: DatabaseObject

Execution.description: Per-stream destination execution override for pipeline runtime batching defaults.
Execution.title: Execution

Filter.description:
Stream-owned read predicate.

Endpoint contracts own which fields/params are filterable and which
operators are allowed. Per spec §Filters, `value` is required except
when `operator` is a unary operator (`is_null` / `is_not_null`).

field.description: Database field reference or API endpoint read parameter key.
field.title: Field

operator.description: Operator selected from the applicable source capability.
operator.title: Operator

value.description: JSON value for the predicate; omit for unary operators.
value.title: Value

Filter.title: Filter

FnExpression.description:
`{"op": "fn", "name": "<conversion fn>"}` — one conversion stage of a
`pipe` (#887).

Mirrors the engine's `fn` AST node. `name` is closed over the conversion
functions the engine-published conversion matrix declares for `explicit`
conversions — the matrix cell's `fn` is what an author (the FE mapping
editor) wires in, so a name the engine would reject at transform build is
not authorable. The engine's optional `version`/`args` node fields are
intentionally not published: the engine defaults them (`version=1`,
`args=[]`) and no declarable conversion takes arguments.

name.description: Conversion function name. Closed over the functions the engine-published conversion matrix declares for `explicit` conversions.
name.title: Name

FnExpression.title: FnExpression

FullRefreshReplication.description: Full-refresh replication: each run re-reads the whole source; no cursor.
FullRefreshReplication.title: FullRefreshReplication

GetExpression.description:
`{"op": "get", "path": "<source field reference>"}` — read a source
field.
GetExpression.title: GetExpression

IncrementalReplication.description: Incremental replication: resume from the last committed `cursor_field` value.

cursor_field.description: Source field reference tracking incremental progress.
cursor_field.title: Cursor Field

IncrementalReplication.title: IncrementalReplication

KeysetDatabasePagination.description: Keyset (seek) read paging. `order_by_field` defines the seek order and is required.

order_by_field.description: Source field reference for page ordering; required for keyset.
order_by_field.title: Order By Field

page_size.description: Positive integer read page size; pipeline batch-size default applies when omitted.
page_size.title: Page Size

KeysetDatabasePagination.title: KeysetDatabasePagination

order_by_field.description: Source field reference for page ordering; optional for offset.
order_by_field.title: Order By Field

page_size.description: Positive integer read page size; pipeline batch-size default applies when omitted.
page_size.title: Page Size

PipeExpression.description:
`{"op": "pipe", "args": [<get>, <fn>, ...]}` — a source read piped
through one or more declared conversion functions (#887).

Mirrors the engine's `pipe` AST node: `args[0]` is the seed expression —
a `get` in the stream grammar (constants use `value.constant`, never an
expression node) — and every later entry is an `fn` conversion stage
applied left to right. This is how an assignment satisfies an `explicit`
conversion-matrix pair (e.g. `Int64 → Utf8` needs `to_string`): the
engine rejects a bare `get` for such a pair at both the transform build
and the destination cast.

args.description: Seed `get` expression followed by one or more `fn` conversion stages, applied left to right.
args.title: Args

PipeExpression.title: PipeExpression

StreamDestination.description: Destination endpoint binding and stream-owned destination options.

write.description: Stream-selected write behavior for this destination.

StreamDestination.title: StreamDestination

StreamMapping.description: Source-to-destination assignment rules. Optional — omit for default mapping.

assignments.description: Ordered list of field assignments. Order is significant.
assignments.title: Assignments

StreamMapping.title: StreamMapping

StreamSource.description: Source endpoint binding and stream-owned read options.

database_pagination.description: Database source read-page configuration. Defaults to offset pagination with page size from pipeline.runtime.batching.batch_size when omitted for database sources.
database_pagination.title: Database Pagination

primary_keys.description: Stream-owned source identity hint when the endpoint does not provide primary-key metadata.
primary_keys.title: Primary Keys

replication.description: Stream-selected replication policy. Omission allowed only when the source supports full_refresh.
replication.title: Replication

selected_columns.description: Ordered source field references; database sources only.
selected_columns.title: Selected Columns

StreamSource.title: StreamSource

StreamValidationErrorHandling.description: Mirror of the shared error-handling shape (`pipeline.ErrorHandling` in `analitiq.contracts.pipelines`).
StreamValidationErrorHandling.title: StreamValidationErrorHandling

error_handling.description: Validation failure handling override. When omitted, the pipeline runtime.error_handling default applies.

ValidationRule.description: Stream record validation rule — see §Assignment Validation.

field.description: Mapped output field path validated by this rule.
field.title: Field

value.description: Rule parameter. Required for min_length/max_length/pattern/range/in_list; must be omitted for required/not_null.
value.title: Value

ValidationRule.title: ValidationRule

Write.description: Stream-selected write behavior for one destination.

conflict_keys.description: Database upsert conflict target — a single composite key set (non-empty list of destination field names). Required for a database (`scope=connection`) upsert; forbidden for an API (`scope=connector`) destination, whose conflict key is endpoint-owned (`operations.write.upsert.conflict_keys`). Presence is enforced by `StreamDestination`, which knows the destination scope. Multiple alternative key sets are out of scope until a connector needs them.
conflict_keys.title: Conflict Keys

mode.description: Write mode. API: selected endpoint operations.write key. Database: 'insert' or 'upsert'.
mode.title: Mode

Write.title: Write

description: Public JSON Schema contract for Analitiq stream documents — the authored shape used in source control, PR review, and author-time tooling. Server-managed fields (stream_id, version, org_id, created_at, updated_at) are forbidden in the authored shape and assigned by the stream service on ingest. The persisted-record shape is internal and not published. Source of truth: analitiq.contracts.stream.StreamInput (Pydantic).

$schema.description: Stream schema URL (optional in API payloads).
$schema.title: $Schema

mapping.description: Explicit source-to-destination field mapping. Omit for runtime default mapping.

pipeline_id.description: Parent pipeline reference. Typically the base pipeline UUID; the schema accepts any non-empty string — engines resolve the reference at runtime. Immutable after creation.
pipeline_id.title: Pipeline Id

stream_id.description: Stream UUID (RFC-4122). Optional in authored definitions so external publishers can assign their own identifier; service-assigned on ingest when omitted.
stream_id.title: Stream Id

tags.description: Grouping/search labels (max 50, each 1-64 chars, unique, trimmed).
tags.title: Tags

title: Analitiq Stream
